title: The Exchange
content: The man's eyebrows shoot up. The name 'Sterling' acts like a magic spell. He checks a small leather-bound ledger and beckons a junior waiter.||'Ah, yes. Mr. Sterling mentioned an associate might collect his belongings. He was quite... insistent about it.'||The waiter returns with a slim, expensive leather briefcase. You feel the weight of it—heavy with paper. As you take it, you notice the maître d' glancing nervously at a table in the corner where two men in gray suits are watching you intently.
